title: Merged Blocks
description:
Need more variety when building?
With this mod, all Minecraft blocks can be merged in vertical, horizontal, and diagonal combinations (Merged Blocks). This mod theoretically adds 2,000,000+ combinations.
body:
Need more variety when building?
With this mod, all Minecraft blocks can be merged in vertical, horizontal, and diagonal combinations (Merged Blocks). This mod theoretically adds 2,000,000+ combinations.

**Warning:**

Since this is my first mod, some minor or major bugs are to be expected. In addition, the mod is not yet well optimized, which can cause FPS drops when a higher number of merged blocks are set.

Please note that this mod is not yet a finished version!

**Known bugs**
- Diagonal rendering when upside / downside
- Buggy shift-crafting
- No face culling yet
